title: Xenocontendi Revived 16x
description: A resource pack originally created by Disethas, revived for current Minecraft versions.
body:
![Xenocontendi Revived Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5QnttfX4/images/4e381a4b3ac2b01b27c77920557a3cecbcec4bf6.png)

**Originally created by [Disethas](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/resource-packs/1223592-xenocontendi-resource-pack)!**

---

**Now supports both [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Fresh Animation: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension)!**

- [Xenocontendi Revived X Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xenocontendi-revived-x-fresh-animations)
- [Xenocontendi Revived X Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xenocontendi-revived-x-fresh-animations-player-extension)

---

### What is Xenocontendi?

> "Xenocontendi is a resource pack with a smooth texture style, and a heavy focus on color use. Another important trait is that building blocks stay close to the appearance of vanilla textures."


### Why Revive Xenocontendi?

I used this resource pack a lot when playing MC as a kid. I loved its simplicity, its colors and its vanilla-friendly style. I was and still am a Xenocontendi lover...But I was disappointed to find that Xenocontendi was never updated past MC 1.8......So I BROUGHT IT BACK!!

See something broken or vanilla texture that I missed? Leave a comment! I'd appreciate the feedback/notes!

---

![Mod Support Banner](https://i.imgur.com/5z2622f.png)

### Optifine Features
-Custom Biome and GUI colors  

-Random Mob Textures  

-Connected Textures

***Alternatively, these Fabric equivalent mods will also work:***  
-**Polytone** - Custom Biome and GUI Colors

-**Entity Texture Features** - Random Mob Textures  

-**Continuity** - Connected Textures  

---
